title: What Makes Judaism Different from Islam? A Respectful Comparison
title_zh: 犹太教与伊斯兰教的区别是什么？一次尊重的比较
title_he: מה ההבדלים בין היהדות לאסלאם? השוואה מכבדת
description: Shared roots and key divergences — prophecy, law, the Land of Israel, and the nature of revelation — explained with mutual respect.
author: Torah Light Project
target_audience: Chinese native Mandarin speakers with no prior knowledge of Judaism
cultural_parallels: Confucian interpretation schools vs Jewish/Islamic revelation models
Chinese commentary tradition parallels rabbinic and Islamic scholarly interpretation
chinese_historical_context: Warring States Period (战国时代) ~ 350 BCE (end of prophecy)
Late Han Dynasty (汉朝) ~ 200 CE (Mishnah compilation)
Song Dynasty scholars like Zhu Xi (朱熹) as analogy for interpretive tradition
